scenario: GateResult was produced by the executor and stamped with its own approval, with no independent verification chain. The GateResult lacks an evidence chain linking it to a verifiable check.
input_report_features: GateResult record has result='pass' but the checked_at timestamp is identical to the RunSpec.finished_at timestamp (same second). The gate appears to have been auto-generated without actual verification. No evidence_ids field linking to EvidenceIndex records. The gate result is 'self-signed' by the executor.
expected_findings: Gate result has no evidence chain (evidence_ids is empty)
Gate timestamp suggests auto-generation, not real verification
review-004: claims must be traceable to observable evidence
review-005: gate results must be explicitly produced, not assumed
